commit: === ML STRATEGY (sell_edge, realistic env, 200 val markets) ===
=== RL AGENT (imitation + PPO, gym env, all 5 actions per slot) ===
ML: XGBoost lossguide 384 leaves, 95 features (42 numerical + 6 temporal + 50 tags - 3 dropped)
RL: BC (ML-edge expert) → PPO (lr=1e-5, no adv norm), best-Sharpe checkpoint
Strategy: sell_edge (buy NO when YES overpriced), no sports, mid≥10%
GRU: 32-dim temporal embeddings (available, disabled in transport)
